command: fnm exec --using 22.22.0 bash -lc 'pnpm -s run dev & pid=$!; sleep 35; pkill -TERM -P $pid 2>/dev/null || true; kill -TERM $pid 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 2; pkill -KILL -P $pid 2>/dev/null || true; kill -KILL $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid || true'
notes: ERROR  [unhandledRejection] EMFILE: too many open files, watch
